response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across stacks and domains, aligning well with the role’s technical demands; however, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there is limited evidence of executive-level leadership, architectural oversight, or formal project management experience beyond individual contributor roles.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js/DLang), and modern architectures
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and knowledge sharing in tech communities
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of the required C1 level
Lacks clear evidence of strategic IT architecture leadership or client-facing advisory experience
No explicit mention of UML, requirements management, or compliance/risk frameworks in resume
